select.isEmpty: SELECT A.CAR_ID CAR_ID, A.CAR_NAME CAR_NAME, A.CAR_NAME2 CAR_NAME2, A.CAR_LEVEL CAR_LEVEL, A.CAR_STEP CAR_STEP, A.CAR_UPPER CAR_UPPER, A.CAR_GB CAR_GB, A.CAR_URL, A.CAR_EXPLAIN, A.CAR_ACCESS CAR_ACCESS, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID), 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_CLSCNT, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID), 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )SUB_RESCNT, '0' ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE CAR_ID = 1 AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0

isEqual.isEqual:
SELECT B.CAR_ID, B.CAR_NAME, B.CAR_NAME2, B.CAR_LEVEL, B.CAR_STEP, B.CAR_UPPER, B.CAR_GB, B.CAR_URL, B.CAR_EXPLAIN, B.CAR_ACCESS, B.SUB_CLSCNT, B.SUB_RESCNT, B.ACCESS_LVL FROM ( SELECT A.CAR_ID CAR_ID, A.CAR_NAME CAR_NAME, A.CAR_NAME2 CAR_NAME2, A.CAR_LEVEL CAR_LEVEL, A.CAR_STEP CAR_STEP, A.CAR_UPPER CAR_UPPER, A.CAR_GB CAR_GB, A.CAR_URL, A.CAR_EXPLAIN, A.CAR_ACCESS CAR_ACCESS, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID), 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )SUB_CLSCNT, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DELFLAG = 0
) SUB_RESCNT, '0' ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE CAR_Upper = NVL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY CAR_GB, CAR_STEP)B JOIN TBL_CAR_ACL C ON B.CAR_ID = C.CAR_ID AND C.MEMBER_ID IN
#jobss[]#
GROUP BY B.CAR_ID, B.CAR_NAME, B.CAR_NAME2, B.CAR_LEVEL, B.CAR_STEP, B.CAR_UPPER, B.CAR_GB, B.CAR_URL, B.CAR_EXPLAIN, B.CAR_ACCESS, B.SUB_CLSCNT, B.SUB_RESCNT, B.ACCESS_LVL
isEqual.isNotEqual:
SELECT A.CAR_ID CAR_ID, A.CAR_NAME CAR_NAME, A.CAR_NAME2 CAR_NAME2, A.CAR_LEVEL CAR_LEVEL, A.CAR_STEP CAR_STEP, A.CAR_UPPER CAR_UPPER, A.CAR_GB CAR_GB, A.CAR_URL, A.CAR_EXPLAIN, A.CAR_ACCESS CAR_ACCESS, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID), 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_CLSCNT, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DELFLAG = 0
) SUB_RESCNT, '0' ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE CAR_UPPER = NVL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY CAR_GB, CAR_STEP

isNotEqual.isEqual:
SELECT B.CAR_ID, B.CAR_NAME, B.CAR_NAME2, B.CAR_LEVEL, B.CAR_STEP, B.CAR_UPPER, B.CAR_GB, B.CAR_URL, B.CAR_EXPLAIN, B.CAR_ACCESS, B.SUB_CLSCNT, B.SUB_RESCNT, B.ACCESS_LVL FROM ( SELECT A.CAR_ID CAR_ID, A.CAR_NAME CAR_NAME, A.CAR_NAME2 CAR_NAME2, A.CAR_LEVEL CAR_LEVEL, A.CAR_STEP CAR_STEP, A.CAR_UPPER CAR_UPPER, A.CAR_GB CAR_GB, A.CAR_ACCESS CAR_ACCESS, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID), 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_CLSCNT, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_RESCNT, '0' ACCESS_LVL, CAR_URL, CAR_EXPLAIN FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE CAR_Upper = NVL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY CAR_STEP )B JOIN TBL_CAR_ACL C ON B.CAR_ID = C.CAR_ID AND C.MEMBER_ID IN
#jobss[]#
GROUP BY B.CAR_ID, B.CAR_NAME, B.CAR_NAME2, B.CAR_LEVEL, B.CAR_STEP, B.CAR_UPPER, B.CAR_GB, B.CAR_URL, B.CAR_EXPLAIN, B.CAR_ACCESS, B.SUB_CLSCNT, B.SUB_RESCNT, B.ACCESS_LVL
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT A.CAR_ID CAR_ID, A.CAR_NAME CAR_NAME, A.CAR_NAME2 CAR_NAME2, A.CAR_LEVEL CAR_LEVEL, A.CAR_STEP CAR_STEP, A.CAR_UPPER CAR_UPPER, A.CAR_GB CAR_GB, A.CAR_ACCESS CAR_ACCESS, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Car_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_CLSCNT, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID), 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_RESCNT, '0' ACCESS_LVL, CAR_URL, CAR_EXPLAIN FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE CAR_UPPER = NVL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY CAR_STEP

select.isEmpty: SELECT A.CAR_ID car_id , A.CAR_NAME car_name , A.CAR_NAME2 car_name2 , A.CAR_LEVEL car_level , A.CAR_STEP car_step , A.CAR_UPPER car_upper , A.CAR_GB car_gb , A.CAR_URL, A.CAR_EXPLAIN, A.CAR_ACCESS car_access , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE CAR_ID = 1 AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0

isNotEmpty.isEqual:
SELECT A.CAR_ID car_id , A.CAR_NAME car_name , A.CAR_NAME2 car_name2 , A.CAR_LEVEL car_level , A.CAR_STEP car_step , A.CAR_UPPER car_upper , A.CAR_GB car_gb , A.CAR_URL, A.CAR_EXPLAIN, A.CAR_ACCESS car_access , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DELFLAG = 0
) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE CAR_Upper = NVL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY CAR_GB, CAR_Step
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT A.CAR_ID car_id , A.CAR_NAME car_name , A.CAR_NAME2 car_name2 , A.CAR_LEVEL car_level , A.CAR_STEP car_step , A.CAR_UPPER car_upper , A.CAR_GB car_gb , A.CAR_ACCESS car_access , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Car_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Car_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl, CAR_URL, CAR_EXPLAIN FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE Car_Upper = NVL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Car_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY Car_Step

select.isEmpty: SELECT A.CAR_ID car_id , A.CAR_NAME car_name , A.CAR_NAME2 car_name2 , A.CAR_LEVEL car_level , A.CAR_STEP car_step , A.CAR_UPPER car_upper , A.CAR_GB car_gb , A.CAR_URL, A.CAR_EXPLAIN, A.CAR_ACCESS car_access , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_CLSCNT , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_RESCNT , '0' ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE A.CAR_ID = 1 AND A.COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT DISTINCT(CAR_ID) , A.CAR_NAME car_name , A.CAR_NAME2 car_name2 , A.CAR_LEVEL car_level , A.CAR_STEP car_step , A.CAR_UPPER car_upper , A.CAR_GB car_gb , A.CAR_URL, A.CAR_EXPLAIN, A.CAR_ACCESS car_access , (SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID), 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND CAR_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AS SUB_CLSCNT, (SELECT NVL(COUNT(CAR_ID), 0) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = A.CAR_ID AND COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND DELFLAG = 0 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AS SUB_RESCNT, '' AS ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_CAR A
WHERE A.CAR_UPPER = #v_P_PARENTID# AND A.COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND A.CAR_GB = '1' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 UNION
SELECT DISTINCT(CAR_ID) , A.CAR_NAME car_name , A.CAR_NAME2 car_name2 , A.CAR_LEVEL car_level , A.CAR_STEP car_step , A.CAR_UPPER car_upper , A.CAR_GB car_gb , A.CAR_URL, A.CAR_EXPLAIN, A.CAR_ACCESS car_access , 0 AS SUB_CLSCNT, 0 AS SUB_RESCNT, '' AS ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_CAR A WHERE A.COMPANYID = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND A.CAR_GB = '2' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFALG = 0 ORDER BY CAR_GB, CAR_STEP

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(CAR_ID) cnt FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = #carID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DELFLAG = 0

SELECT COMPANYID, CAR_GB, CAR_ID, CAR_LEVEL, CAR_NAME, OWNERID, OWNERNM, CAR_STEP, CAR_UPPER, CAR_URL, OWNERCALL, (SUBSTR(CAR_REGISTER_DATE, 1, 4)|| '-' || SUBSTR(CAR_REGISTER_DATE, 5, 2) || '-'|| SUBSTR(CAR_REGISTER_DATE, 7, 2)) CAR_REGISTER_DATE FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = #carID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY CAR_STEP
sqlMap.update: update tbl_car set delflag = 1 where car_id = #carID# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and companyid = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT (CAR_LEVEL + 1) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_ClassGB# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (NVL(MAX(Car_Step) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = #v_P_ClassGB# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CAR ( CAR_UPPER, OWNDEPTID, OWNDEPTNM, OWNERID, OWNERNM, OWNERPOSITION, OWNERCALL, CAR_NAME, COMPANYID, CAR_ID, CAR_GB, CAR_LEVEL, CAR_STEP, CAR_REGISTER_DATE, CAR_URL, CAR_ACCESS, CAR_NAME2, OWNDEPTNM2, OWNERNM2, OWNERPOSITION2, TENANT_ID, DELFLAG, CAR_NM ) VALUES ( #v_P_ClassGB#, #v_P_ODeptID#, #v_P_ODeptNm#, #v_P_OwnerID#, #v_P_OwnerNm#, #v_P_OwnerPos#, #v_P_OwnerCall#, #v_P_Brd_NM#, #v_P_CompanyID#, #carID#, #v_Brd_GB#, #v_Brd_Level#, #v_Brd_Step#, TO_CHAR(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP),'YYYYMMDD'), '', #v_Brd_Access#, #v_P_Brd_NM2#, #v_P_ODeptNm2#, #v_P_OwnerNm2#, #v_P_OwnerPos2#, #tenantID#, 0, #car_nm# )

INSERT INTO TBL_CAR_FORM ( REGISTER_ID, TENANT_ID, REGISTER_DATE, CAR_ID, CAR_FORM_ID, REV_DATE, REV_TIME, REV_TIME2, DRIVER_DEPTNAME, DRIVER_NAME, B_DEPART_TIME, B_DISTANCE, DRIVE_PURPOSE, DRIVE_POINT, A_ARRIVE_TIME, A_DISTANCE, A_DISTANCE_AUTO, A_DISTANCE_COMMUTE, A_DISTANCE_WORK, A_DISTANCE_ETC, CAR_REGISTER_NO, A_SUBMIT_FLAG, COMPANYID, DELFLAG ) VALUES ( #register_id#,#tenant_id#,TO_DATE(#register_date#,'YY/MM/DD'),#carID#,#car_form_id#,TO_DATE(#rev_date#,'YY/MM/DD'),#rev_time#,#rev_time2#,#driver_deptname#,#driver_name#, #b_depart_time#,#b_distance#,#drive_purpose#,#drive_point#,#a_arrive_time#,#a_distance#, #a_distance_auto#,#a_distance_commute#,#a_distance_work#,#a_distance_etc#,#car_register_no#, #control#, #companyID#, 0 )
sqlMap.select: SELECT CAR_ID , CAR_NAME , CAR_NAME2 , OWNDEPTID , OWNDEPTNM , OWNDEPTNM2 , OWNERID , OWNERNM , OWNERNM2 , OWNERPOSITION , OWNERPOSITION2 , OWNERCALL , (SUBSTR(CAR_REGISTER_DATE, 1, 4)|| '-' || SUBSTR(CAR_REGISTER_DATE, 5, 2) || '-'|| SUBSTR(CAR_REGISTER_DATE, 7, 2)) CAR_REGISTER_DATE , CAR_ACCESS, CAR_NM FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_ID = #carID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT FILEPATH FROM TBL_CAR_ATTACH WHERE CAR_ID = #carID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ATTACHID ASC
SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN=#userID# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID#

SELECT C.REGISTER_DATE, C.REV_DATE, C.REGISTER_ID, C.CAR_FORM_ID, C.REGISTER_DEPTNAME, C.REGISTER_NAME FROM( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY A.CAR_FORM_ID ORDER BY A.CAR_FORM_ID) AS ROW_NUM, TO_CHAR(A.REGISTER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGISTER_DATE, A.REV_DATE, A.REGISTER_ID, A.CAR_FORM_ID, B.DESCRIPTION AS REGISTER_DEPTNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME AS REGISTER_NAME FROM TBL_CAR_FORM A, TBL_USERMASTER B WHERE A.REGISTER_ID = B.CN AND A.CAR_ID = #carID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 AND A.REV_DATE >= TO_DATE(#currentDate#, 'YYYYMM') AND A.REV_DATE < TO_DATE(#currentEndDate#, 'YYYYMM') )C WHERE C.ROW_NUM = 1

SELECT A.REGISTER_DATE,A.REV_DATE,A.REV_TIME,A.REV_TIME2, A.REGISTER_ID, A.CAR_FORM_ID, B.DESCRIPTION AS REGISTER_DEPTNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME AS REGISTER_NAME, A.REGISTER_ID AS REGISTER_ID FROM TBL_CAR_FORM A, TBL_USERMASTER B WHERE A.REGISTER_ID = B.CN AND A.CAR_ID = #carID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.CAR_FORM_ID != #carFormID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 AND A.REV_DATE >= TO_DATE(#yearMonth#, 'YYYYMM') AND A.REV_DATE < TO_DATE(#yearMonthEnd#, 'YYYYMM')
ORDER BY A.CAR_FORM_ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CAR SET OWNDEPTID = #v_P_ODeptID#, OWNDEPTNM = #v_P_ODeptNm#, OWNERID = #v_P_OwnerID#, OWNERNM = #v_P_OwnerNm#, OWNERCALL = #v_P_OwnerCall#, CAR_NAME = #v_P_Brd_NM#, CAR_NAME2 = #v_P_Brd_NM2#, CAR_NM = #car_nm# WHERE CAR_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_CAR_FORM SET DELFLAG = 1, CAR_FORM_ID = #car_form_id2#, REGISTER_DATE = TO_DATE(#currentDate#,'YY/MM/DD') WHERE CAR_ID = #carID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CAR_FORM_ID = #car_form_id#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CAR_ATTACH WHERE CAR_ID = #carID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(CAR_ID) cnt FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = #v_PBRDID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT COMPANYID, CAR_GB, CAR_ID, CAR_LEVEL, CAR_NAME, OWNERID, OWNERNM, CAR_STEP, CAR_UPPER, CAR_URL, OWNERCALL, (SUBSTR(CAR_REGISTER_DATE, 1, 4)|| '-' || SUBSTR(CAR_REGISTER_DATE, 5, 2) || '-'|| SUBSTR(CAR_REGISTER_DATE, 7, 2)) CAR_REGISTER_DATE FROM TBL_CAR WHERE CAR_UPPER = #carID# AND CAR_GB = '2' AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY CAR_STEP
SELECT (NVL(MAX(CAR_FORM_ID) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_CAR_FORM WHERE CAR_ID = #carID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT CAR_FORM_ID, CAR_ID, REGISTER_ID, DRIVER_NAME, DRIVER_DEPTNAME, TO_CHAR(REGISTER_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') REGISTER_DATE, B_DEPART_TIME, B_DISTANCE, DRIVE_PURPOSE, NVL(DRIVE_POINT,' ') DRIVE_POINT, REV_TIME, REV_TIME2, TO_CHAR(REV_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') REV_DATE, A_ARRIVE_TIME, A_DISTANCE, A_DISTANCE_AUTO, A_DISTANCE_COMMUTE, A_DISTANCE_WORK, A_DISTANCE_ETC, A_SUBMIT_FLAG, DELFLAG, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, CAR_REGISTER_NO FROM TBL_CAR_FORM A WHERE A.CAR_ID = #carID# AND A.CAR_FORM_ID = #car_form_id# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY A.CAR_REGISTER_NO
sqlMap.update: update tbl_car_form set delflag = 1 where car_id = #carID# and car_form_id = #car_form_id# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and companyid = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CAR_FORM_ID, CAR_ID, REGISTER_ID, DRIVER_NAME, DRIVER_DEPTNAME, REGISTER_DATE, B_DEPART_TIME, B_DISTANCE, DRIVE_PURPOSE, DRIVE_POINT, REV_TIME, REV_TIME2, TO_CHAR(REV_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') REV_DATE, A_ARRIVE_TIME, A_DISTANCE, A_DISTANCE_AUTO, A_DISTANCE_COMMUTE, A_DISTANCE_WORK, A_DISTANCE_ETC, A_SUBMIT_FLAG, DELFLAG, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID, CAR_REGISTER_NO FROM TBL_CAR_FORM A WHERE A.CAR_ID = #carID# AND A.REV_DATE >= TO_DATE(#yearMonth#, 'YYYYMM') AND A.REV_DATE < TO_DATE(#yearMonthEnd#, 'YYYYMM') AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY A.REV_DATE, A.REV_TIME
SELECT ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_CAR_ACL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND CAR_ID = #v_BRD_UPPER# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT DEPT_YN , SDA_YN , MEMBER_NAM , MEMBER_ID , ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_CAR_ACL WHERE CAR_ID = #v_BRD_UPPER# AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND SDA_Yn = 'Y' AND MEMBER_ID IN
#v_PUSERID[]#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT member_id, access_lvl FROM TBL_CAR_ACL WHERE companyid = #companyID# AND CAR_ID = #resID# AND ( MEMBER_ID = #memberID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ACCESS_LVL ASC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT CAR_UPPER FROM TBL_CAR WHERE COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CAR_ID = #carID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
